name: CaptivateIQ Sales Compensation REST API
what_it_does: CaptivateIQ sales compensation management REST API for revenue operations and finance teams to automate incentive compensation management, commission calculation, and sales performance reporting — enabling AI agents to retrieve compensation data, access rep earnings, sync CRM transaction data, and integrate commission results with HCM and payroll platforms through CaptivateIQ's spreadsheet-native ICM platform. Enables AI agents to manage payee management for sales representative payee profile and compensation assignment automation, handle earnings management for commission calculation and payout amount retrieval automation, access transaction management for CRM deal and revenue transaction data ingestion automation, retrieve plan management for compensation plan structure and tier query automation, manage quota management for quota assignment and attainment percentage retrieval automation, handle statement management for compensation statement generation and payee access automation, access audit management for commission calculation audit log and change history retrieval automation, retrieve reporting for compensation analytics, payout trend, and attainment reporting automation, manage adjustment management for commission adjustment and clawback processing automation, and integrate CaptivateIQ with Salesforce, Workday, ADP, and enterprise CRM/HCM for end-to-end commission management automation.
use_cases: Syncing Salesforce opportunity data to CaptivateIQ for automated commission calculation for revenue operations agents
Retrieving rep commission statements and earnings for payroll processing and compensation transparency agents
Monitoring compensation plan attainment and identifying underpaid or overpaid commissions for finance operations agents
Generating compensation analytics for RevOps reporting on plan effectiveness and commission cost agents
not_for: Base salary and payroll processing (CaptivateIQ is variable compensation ICM; Workday and ADP serve base salary payroll)
Sales pipeline and forecasting (CaptivateIQ is commission management; Salesforce and Clari serve pipeline and forecasting)
Sales territory and capacity planning (CaptivateIQ is comp calculation; Xactly Align and Anaplan serve territory planning)
best_when: A revenue operations or finance team wanting AI agents to automate CRM data ingestion, commission calculation retrieval, payee statement generation, and compensation data integration with payroll systems through CaptivateIQ's modern ICM platform.
avoid_when: CAPTIVATEIQ LICENSE IS REQUIRED: CaptivateIQ serves enterprises; automated open-developer assumption creates account_required for organizations without CaptivateIQ subscription; automated must have active CaptivateIQ account. CRM DATA INTEGRATION IS PREREQUISITE: CaptivateIQ calculations depend on CRM transaction data being synced; automated standalone assumption creates calculation_lag for commission results not reflecting latest CRM deals; automated must configure CRM integration and ensure data sync is current. CALCULATION RUNS ON SCHEDULE: CaptivateIQ commission calculations run on scheduled cycles (monthly, quarterly); automated real-time assumption creates stale_calculation for commission queries between calculation cycles; automated must align queries with calculation cycle timing. PLAN CONFIGURATION IS SPREADSHEET-BASED: CaptivateIQ uses spreadsheet-style plan configuration; automated programmatic-plan-creation assumption creates configuration_limited for automated plan changes not supported through API; automated must use CaptivateIQ UI for plan configuration changes.

auth.notes: CaptivateIQ uses API key and OAuth2 for Sales Compensation REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Conway Teng, Mark Schopmeyer, and Siddharth Bhatt (ex-McKinsey). Raised $46M (Sequoia, Accel, Andreessen Horowitz seed). Products: CaptivateIQ Platform (ICM), CaptivateIQ Analytics, CaptivateIQ Statements. 700+ enterprise customers including Gong, Intercom, Amplitude. Spreadsheet-native ICM approach. Competes with Xactly, Everstage, and Salesforce Spiff for modern sales compensation management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per payee; enterprise custom pricing; platform and analytics modules
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. $46M raised (Sequoia, Accel). 700+ customers including Gong, Intercom. Annual per-payee subscription.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per token; compensation data APIs throttled per subscription

known_agent_gotchas: PLAN PERIOD SCOPING IS REQUIRED: CaptivateIQ earnings queries require specifying compensation plan period; automated current-period assumption creates empty_results for earnings queries without specifying target month or quarter; automated must specify plan period for all earnings and attainment queries

TRANSACTION INGESTION IS APPEND-ONLY: CaptivateIQ transaction data flows from CRM; automated direct-insert assumption creates sync_conflict for compensation workflows attempting to inject transactions outside CRM integration; automated must push transactions through configured CRM integration not direct API writes

CALCULATION TIMING AFFECTS ACCURACY: CaptivateIQ commissions are calculated on schedule; automated instant-accuracy assumption creates stale_commission for rep earnings queries before current cycle calculation completes; automated should trigger calculation before querying results for most current data

PAYEE IDs ARE CAPTIVATEIQ-INTERNAL: CaptivateIQ assigns internal payee IDs separate from CRM user IDs; automated CRM-ID assumption creates payee_not_found for earnings queries using Salesforce user ID without mapping to CaptivateIQ payee ID; automated must maintain ID mapping

COMPENSATION DATA IS SENSITIVE PII: Commission amounts and compensation tier data are sensitive PII; automated unrestricted-access assumption creates unauthorized_disclosure for compensation data without role-based access controls; automated must implement data access controls for compensation data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sales compensation/ICM. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Individual commission and earnings data (PII).

security_score_components.security_notes: ICM/sales compensation. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Commission, quota, and payee compensation data (PII).
